# arubasdwan_security_zones (Data Source)

Fetches the list of security zones from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/zones.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_security_zones" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `security_zones` (Attributes List) List of security zones configured on the Orchestrator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_zones))

<a id="nestedatt--security_zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_zones`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the security zone.
- `name` (String) The name of the security zone.
